summary: Combo keywords, Simple Sticky Notes script, Choco update command, PHP+phpMyAdmin modes, OrderedDictionary fix
changes: Script 34: Simple Sticky Notes installer via Chocolatey (simple-sticky-notes)
.\ run.ps1 update command: lists installed Choco packages, confirms, runs choco upgrade all
PHP + phpMyAdmin 3-mode support: php+phpmyadmin (default), php-only, phpmyadmin-only with $env:PHP_MODE
Combo shortcuts: git+desktop, node+pnpm, frontend, backend, web-dev, essentials, full-stack
Generic mode env var dispatcher in run.ps1 ($modeEnvVars map replaces hardcoded NPP_MODE)
Fixed OrderedDictionary ArgumentOutOfRangeException: int keys treated as positional index, now uses string keys
Updated help tables with Combo Shortcuts section in both Show-RootHelp and Show-KeywordTable
